title: Where to buy J-beauty and K-beauty skincare in Buenos Aires
checkedNote: Strictly re-audited Jul 14, 2026 via Google Places API and BrightData/retailer evidence. The rendered guide includes only operational physical stores, showrooms, or branches with evidence of Asian skincare held on site.

validation.source: Google Places API plus branch-specific retailer, social, and press evidence
validation.criteriaNote: Included venues must be operational on Google Maps when a listing exists and must hold Japanese or South Korean skincare in physical stock. Temporarily/permanently closed venues, food/lifestyle shops, online-only sellers, pickup points, and chain branches without branch-specific shelf evidence are excluded.

tldr: The strict list contains only operating physical venues with evidence of Japanese or South Korean skincare on site: dedicated K-beauty stores, stocked showrooms, and a few verified beauty/general stores.
J-beauty remains scarce: there is no dedicated Japanese-skincare walk-in store. JuliJuli and iFans are the clearest physical options for limited Japanese SKUs; confirm the exact product first.
Best shopping-trip order: SKINKO Alcorta → SKINKO Alto Palermo → JuliJuli (by appointment) → Glowspot Callao → Beauty24 Abasto.

recommendations.title: Best dedicated K-beauty browse
recommendations.body: Start at SKINKO Alcorta (Level 3, Jerónimo Salguero 3172) for the largest full-store experience (~90 m²), then SKINKO Alto Palermo (2nd floor) if you want the most convenient Palermo option.

recommendations.title: Specialist showroom selection
recommendations.body: Arrange JuliJuli Beauty K-Shop in Villa Crespo (near Corrientes & Julián Álvarez; exact address via WhatsApp). Published general hours are Mon/Wed/Fri 11:00–13:00 and 14:00–18:00, but they change — confirm first.

recommendations.title: Convenient Recoleta / mainstream fill-ins
recommendations.body: Glowspot Callao (Av. Callao 1407) has a substantial Korean section (Anua, SKIN1004, Coony, Medicube, COSRX). Beauty24 Abasto has specifically documented physical K-beauty stock.

recommendations.title: Japanese skincare
recommendations.body: Do not expect a dedicated Japanese store. Phone-verify JuliJuli or iFans for limited Biore, Hada Labo, Rohto Skin Aqua, Kose, or related Japanese stock before visiting.

recommendations.title: Authenticity
recommendations.body: Prefer sellers that state ANMAT registration and direct-from-Korea sourcing (SKINKO, Skinfree, JuliJuli, Kkot). Treat unbranded bazaar cosmetics and ultra-cheap sheet-mask racks as lower confidence.

caveats: Import-dependent stock and prices fluctuate with Argentina’s import rules and exchange rate; online listings frequently show “Sin stock.”
Glowspot’s Maure 1626 (Cañitas) address is published on the brand site/Instagram but has no dedicated Google Places business listing yet — confirm before travelling.
Kkot Cosmetics is in Nordelta (Tigre) — plan travel time separately from a CABA shopping loop.
Non-specialist shelves (Beauty24, Q Point, Magic Girl, ZAPPA SANG, Casa China) rotate SKUs — confirm the exact product before a dedicated trip.
keyFindings: SKINKO Alcorta is listed on the mall directory at Nivel 3 and covered by Infobae as a ~90 m² June 2026 inauguration; Alto Palermo remains the high-volume flagship Maps listing.

Glowspot operates verified Maps stores at Callao 1407 (Recoleta) and Córdoba 1418 (Tribunales); Instagram/site also list Maure 1626 (Cañitas), which geocodes but has no dedicated Google business listing yet.
Kkot Cosmetics is a dedicated Korean skincare/makeup showroom in Nordelta (Vientos del Delta I, of. 121) — outside central CABA.
Beauty24 Abasto has branch-specific evidence of physical Korean skincare stock; other Beauty24 branches were removed because chain-wide online assortment does not prove branch-level shelf stock.

Magic Girl in Once is a wholesale-oriented walk-in with Korean makeup/skincare on shelves (minimum purchase applies); Charmzone near Floresta is a small Korean cosmetics store with thin Maps review volume.

excluded.name: The Korean Root / KSHOP Argentina / REGY Beauty / Budamarket (as map pins)
excluded.reason: Online importers mentioned in research; no reliable public Google Maps skincare storefront pin was found for a CABA walk-in location (Budamarket has a weak Maps pin with 2 reviews; REGY returned zero results).

excluded.name: Dedicated J-beauty walk-in store
excluded.reason: None found in Buenos Aires as of mid-2026 via Places search and press/retailer checks.

excluded.name: Somi | Korean Cosmetics
excluded.reason: Dedicated K-beauty boutiques exist in Córdoba (Vélez Sarsfield / Córdoba Shopping), not Buenos Aires.

excluded.name: City Girl Beauty (Abasto)
excluded.reason: Verified Abasto beauty shop, but assortment is general/own-brand makeup-lifestyle rather than Japanese/Korean skincare specialist stock.

excluded.name: Care City (Villa Celina)
excluded.reason: Online K-beauty retailer with a GBA pin far from central CABA shopping loops; not added as a BA walk-in destination.

stores.name: SKINKO — Alcorta Shopping
stores.fullAddress: Jerónimo Salguero 3172, C1425 CABA (Alcorta Shopping, Nivel 3)
stores.hours: Daily mall hours (~10:00–21:00; confirm on site)
stores.brands: Full SKINKO Korean catalog (~22 brands) with testers and in-store advice
stores.description: Large K-beauty store with Korean skincare, makeup, testers, and staff guidance on Level 3 of Alcorta Shopping.

stores.name: SKINKO — Alto Palermo
stores.address: 2nd floor, Alto Palermo · Av. Santa Fe 3253
stores.fullAddress: Av. Sta. Fe 3253, C1091 CABA (Alto Palermo Shopping)
stores.brands: COSRX, Medicube, Anua, SKIN1004, Celimax, VT Cosmetics, Dr. Althea, TIRTIR, Unleashia, Torriden, Round Lab and ~22 Korean makeup/skincare brands
stores.description: K-beauty store on Alto Palermo’s second floor, with ANMAT-registered Korean skincare, makeup, testers, and product advice.

stores.name: SKINKO — Alto Avellaneda
stores.fullAddress: Gral. Güemes 897, B1873BOC Avellaneda, Buenos Aires
stores.brands: Same SKINKO Korean catalog
stores.description: K-beauty store in Alto Avellaneda with Korean skincare, makeup, testers, and product guidance.

stores.name: JuliJuli Beauty K-Shop
stores.address: Private showroom · Corrientes & Julián Álvarez (exact address by WhatsApp)
stores.fullAddress: Villa Crespo, CABA · exact address shared privately
stores.brands: SKIN1004, Dr. Althea, Some By Mi, The Face Shop, Dr. Jart+, Beauty of Joseon, Anua, COSRX, Round Lab, Isntree, Torriden, Medicube, Tocobo, Purito + some Japanese (Biore, Hada Labo, Rohto Skin Aqua, Kose)
stores.description: Appointment-based Villa Crespo showroom with a broad range of Korean skincare and limited Japanese skincare.

stores.name: Glowspot — Recoleta (Callao)
stores.brands: Korean section includes Anua, SKIN1004, Coony, Bek, COSRX, Medicube alongside non-Asian skincare
stores.description: Recoleta skincare store with a large Korean section featuring Anua, SKIN1004, Coony, Medicube, and COSRX.

stores.name: Glowspot — Tribunales
stores.brands: Same Glowspot mix — Korean section (Anua, SKIN1004, Coony, etc.) plus general skincare
stores.description: Downtown skincare store with Korean brands including Anua, SKIN1004, Coony, Medicube, and COSRX.

stores.name: Glowspot — Las Cañitas
stores.hours: Confirm via WhatsApp/Instagram (no public Maps hours yet)
stores.brands: Same Glowspot Korean/general skincare mix (confirm on site)
stores.description: Las Cañitas skincare store carrying Korean brands including Anua, SKIN1004, Coony, Medicube, and COSRX.

stores.name: Get The Look — Abasto / Farmacity K-Beauty
stores.fullAddress: Av. Corrientes 3241, C1193AAD CABA (Abasto Shopping; Get The Look mall shop)
stores.brands: Farmacity K-Beauty aisle lists COSRX, Anua, Medicube, SKIN1004, VT Cosmetics, Mixsoon, Celimax, Get The Look — selection varies by branch
stores.description: Abasto beauty shop in the Farmacity group, whose K-beauty range includes SKIN1004 and other mainstream Korean brands.

stores.name: Kkot Cosmetics
stores.address: Vientos del Delta I · Calle del Caminante 80, 1º of. 121
stores.fullAddress: Edificio Vientos del Delta, Calle del Caminante 80 Piso 1, oficina 121, B1670NIO Buenos Aires (Nordelta)
stores.brands: Dedicated Korean skincare and makeup (e.g. Hince and other original K-beauty lines on kkot.com.ar)
stores.description: Nordelta showroom specializing in Korean skincare and makeup, located in Vientos del Delta I.

stores.name: Beauty24 — Abasto
stores.fullAddress: Av. Corrientes 3247, C1193 CABA (Abasto Shopping, subsuelo local N00L010)
stores.brands: Beauty24 Korean Skincare aisle (Anua, SKIN1004, Medicube and other curated K-beauty lines)
stores.description: Abasto perfume and beauty store with physical SKIN1004 products and other mainstream Korean skincare.

stores.name: Beauty24 — Palermo Soho
stores.brands: Same Beauty24 Korean skincare selection (confirm shelf stock; selection rotates)
stores.description: Palermo Soho perfume and beauty store offering the chain’s Korean skincare range alongside makeup and fragrance.

stores.name: Beauty24 — Cabildo
stores.brands: Same Beauty24 Korean skincare selection
stores.description: Belgrano perfume and beauty store offering the chain’s Korean skincare range alongside makeup and fragrance.

stores.name: Q Point
stores.brands: COSRX, Anua, Medicube, Hidehere and other K-beauty lines on qpoint.com.ar — confirm in-store stock
stores.description: Cabildo perfume store with a dedicated walk-in K-beauty section and Korean skincare products.

stores.name: Magic Girl (Once)
stores.fullAddress: Tte. Gral. Juan Domingo Perón 2659, C1040 CABA (Once/Balvanera); second local Sarmiento 2570
stores.brands: Korean makeup and skincare (wholesale-oriented assortment; viral K-beauty SKUs featured in TikTok/IG visits)
stores.description: Once beauty wholesaler with Korean makeup and skincare on its shelves; in-store purchases usually have a minimum spend.

stores.name: Charmzone
stores.brands: Korean cosmetics and related imported goods (Charmzone / “cosmética coreana y más”)
stores.description: Small Floresta-area shop selling Korean cosmetics and general merchandise.

stores.name: Las Margaritas — Santa Fe
stores.brands: Chain K-Beauty assortment announced publicly: COSRX, SKIN1004, Medicube, Tocobo, Beauty of Joseon (confirm branch stock)
stores.description: Recoleta beauty-supply store carrying Korean skincare alongside hair, nail, and salon products.

stores.name: Farmacia Leloir
stores.brands: Medicube and other K-beauty dermocosmetics listed on farmacialeloir.com.ar
stores.description: Recoleta pharmacy and beauty store with a Korean skincare range that includes Medicube.

stores.name: Tina&Co Market
stores.hours: Usually daily 9:00–20:00 — currently closed temporarily for expansion
stores.brands: COSRX, Medicube, SKIN1004, Anua, Mary&May, Biodance, VT, Purito, Arencia, Lador + Korean haircare/beauty-tech
stores.description: Temporarily closed three-level Barrio Chino market whose beauty floor carried a large Korean skincare range.

stores.name: Grupo Skinfree / Coony
stores.brands: Official SKIN1004 distributor; Coony, Konjac, Bek, Shisso + Anua, Celimax, Mixsoon; sunscreens and gentle cleansers frequently praised
stores.description: Palermo Korean-skincare importer and SKIN1004 representative with a weekday storefront and sensitive-skin products.

stores.name: Pinkberries cosmetics
stores.brands: COSRX, Medicube, Anua and other Korean lines listed on pinkberries.com.ar (“100% originales”)
stores.description: Puerto Madero storefront for original Korean skincare and makeup, with walk-in shopping, pickup, and routine advice.

stores.name: iFans Beauty
stores.brands: Mostly Korean (COSRX, Some By Mi, Laneige) plus some Biore (Japanese)
stores.description: Small Belgrano beauty shop carrying Korean products and occasional Japanese Biore skincare.

stores.name: K-Beauty Sur Argentina
stores.brands: Korean skincare importer catalog (confirm current SKUs)
stores.description: Fourth-floor Recoleta showroom and distributor specializing in South Korean skincare and beauty products.

stores.name: ZAPPA SANG
stores.brands: Imported Korean household/lifestyle goods plus Korean cosmetics (Tony Moly, Innisfree and similar historically cited; confirm current shelves)
stores.description: Korean general store in Flores carrying imported skincare, cosmetics, beauty tools, and household goods.

stores.name: Casa China
stores.brands: Primarily food; limited Korean sheet masks (Foodaholic, MJCare)
stores.description: Barrio Chino supermarket with a small shelf of Korean sheet masks and inexpensive beauty products.

stores.name: Luxodia
stores.fullAddress: Online · Belgrano retiro after reservation · luxodia.com
stores.brands: Anua, Beauty of Joseon, Biodance, Celimax, COSRX, Dr. Althea, Medicube, Mixsoon, SKIN1004, Tocobo, VT, and more
stores.description: Online Korean beauty importer offering ANMAT-approved skincare and prepaid order pickup in Belgrano.

stores.name: My Little Tokyo Store
stores.brands: Kawaii lifestyle goods; reviewers mention makeup/accessories — not a dedicated J-beauty skincare catalog
stores.description: Japanese-inspired kawaii boutique selling clothing, accessories, pop-culture goods, makeup, and beauty accessories.

stores.name: Supermercado Ichiban
stores.brands: Japanese/Asian food only — no Japanese skincare on shelves
stores.description: Barrio Chino Japanese supermarket specializing in groceries, seafood, noodles, sauces, and pantry goods.

stores.name: Nueva Casa Japonesa (Kometo)
stores.brands: Japanese food importer retail — food only
stores.description: Japanese food importer and supermarket selling groceries, prepared foods, tableware, and pantry goods.

stores.name: TOA Shoji
stores.brands: Japanese food wholesale/retail — food only
stores.description: Japanese food importer and depot selling packaged groceries and pantry products.

stores.name: Gochiso Productos Japoneses
stores.fullAddress: San Telmo retail historically Bolívar 892; Google Maps listings at Balcarce 1322, C1153 CABA
stores.brands: Japanese food, snacks, bazar, kawaii gifts — no J-beauty skincare line
stores.description: Japanese grocery and bazaar retailer selling food, pantry products, and household goods.
